prompt_text:
### Demographics: 67-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 56.1 kg; Height 160.7 cm; BMI 21.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.5%; 9 months ago 7.2%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 189mg/dL; 9 months ago 154mg/dL; 6 months ago 192mg/dL; 3 months ago 183mg/dL; current 184mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 56.3kg; 9 months ago 55.3kg; 6 months ago 54.7kg; 3 months ago 53.1kg; current 56.1kg), Height (12 months ago 160.7cm; 9 months ago 160.7cm; 6 months ago 160.7cm; 3 months ago 160.7cm; current 160.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 22U/L), AST (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 15U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; current 36mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 239mg/g; 9 months ago 240mg/g; 6 months ago 171mg/g; 3 months ago 227mg/g; current 284mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 78mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 135mg/dL; 9 months ago 133mg/dL; 6 months ago 150mg/dL; 3 months ago 150mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.9g/dL; current 11.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.83 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
